release_blocker: CB-002 (backend CORS allow-headers) — frontend cannot reach live API from a browser until backend adds idempotency-key + request-id to Access-Control-Allow-Headers list. Adapter correctness independently proven via Node-level fetch (4/4 live tests against Railway v1.5.0). Browser-level smoke deferred until CB-002 resolves.
notes: Loop 3 FR-4 resolved via Path B (themeBundle adapter at API client boundary in src/lib/theme-bundle.ts). 4/4 live adapter tests pass against Railway v1.5.0. 5/5 Flow D regression pass (after stale .env.local cleanup, see FR-5). 11 consumer sites untouched and shielded by adapter. MSW stub now mirrors live themeBundle shape — Loop 1 root cause closed at the source. Build clean, +0.25 kB gzipped delta. Doctrine regression clean. CB-002 (CORS) blocks Sprint 1 release; CB-003 (/palette/random non-determinism) is non-blocking because Path B never calls that endpoint.
